# Real Pizza

Real Pizza is a competitive soccer team with a rich trophy history including 14 major titles such as the Monster Cup, European League, Champions League (3 times), Euro 2024, and more. The team's identity is bold, energetic, and community-driven, represented by vibrant yellow and orange colors. The club has a full management team (Club Manager: Adi, Coach: Eyal, Assistant Coach: Itai) and a full squad of named players with shirt numbers. The website needs to be fresher, more unique, and more modern than a rival team's site, and should include merchandise shops (kits, fan gear, souvenirs) to maximize fan engagement and loyalty.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Join the Pizza Party — Real Pizza

URL: https://example.com
Description: Experience the thrill of Real Pizza, the boldest competitive soccer team with 14 major titles. Find leagues, games, and fan action near you. Get in the game today!

Join the Pizza Party — Real Pizza

- Club Legacy

- Fan Shops



צור קשר


























# ריל פיצה עולים כאלופים


### 14 תארים גדולים. אש בלתי פוסקת. קהילה שחיה ונושמת את המשחק היפה — זה יותר ממועדון, זו תנועה.


הכירו את הסגל
לחנות המוצרים













14
תארים גדולים






3 x

ליגת האלופות




2024

יורו למועדונים





מורשת של ניצחון, הבנויה על תשוקה, נחישות ודחף בלתי מתפשר לשליטה בליגה.

















## מחושלים באש. מוכתרים בתפארה.


ריל פיצה היא לא רק מועדון — זו תנועה. משאגת היציעים ועד לדיוק על המגרש, כל מסירה, כל שער, כל גביע הם עדות לחיפוש הבלתי פוסק שלנו אחר מצוינות. כאן נוצרות אגדות וההיסטוריה נכתבת בזהב.



- ליגת האלופות 3 פעמים

- יורו 2024 אליפות מועדונים

- גביע המפלצות אלוף-העל

- הליגה האירופית 22

- אלוף האלופים תואר מורשת

























## הסגל שלנו


בהובלת עדי, אייל ואיתי, ריל פיצה היא יותר מקבוצה — זו אחווה שחושלה באש, מוכנה להגן על כל תואר בתשוקה בלתי מתפשרת.












1


### Shmuel Salto


שוער









7


### Noam Kuzia


קשר









9


### Li Daniel Noam


חלוץ









10


### Asaf Daniel


חלוץ התקפה









6


### Yehonatan Livne


בלם









11


### Itai Itayus Nachman


קיצוני










צפו בסגל המלא












## הצטיידו כמו אלופים


לבשו את הסמל בגאווה. מהמגרש לרחובות, ייצגו את ריל פיצה עם מרצ'נדייז בלעדי ואיכותי שעוצב עבור האוהד האמיתי.











חולצות רשמיות

חולצות נושמות ומוכנות למשחק. תיראו כמו הסגל.

From ₪199










חנות אוהדים

ג'קטים, כובעים וצעיפים עבור האיש ה-12 הנאמן.

From ₪89










מזכרות

ספלים, מחזיקי מפתחות ופריטי אספנות לשמור לנצח.

From ₪49





גלו את החנות המלאה











מחושלת תחת הזרקורים. בנויה לתפארה. ריל פיצה היא יותר ממועדון — זו מורשת בתנועה.

## 14 Titles, One Dynasty — Real Pizza

URL: https://example.com/club-legacy
Description: Dive into Real Pizza&#39;s trophy-laden history from Monster Cup to Euro 2024 glory. Relive the moments that built our unstoppable legacy. Celebrate greatness with us!

14 Titles, One Dynasty — Real Pizza






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Club Legacy
- Squad & Management
- Fan Shops



צור קשר


























# More Than a Club. A Legacy Forged in Gold.


Real Pizza isn't just a name on a jersey. We are a brotherhood built on passion, resilience, and an unquenchable thirst for victory. From the floodlit pitches of local tournaments to the grand stages of European competition, our story is written in every tackle, every goal, and every trophy lifted under the lights. With 14 major titles adorning our cabinet — including three Champions League crowns and the Euro 2024 trophy — we stand as a monument to what a community-driven club can achieve when heart meets ambition.


Explore Our Trophies
Meet the Squad





















Our History

## Trophy Legacy


A chronicle of dominance, built on passion and the relentless pursuit of glory. Every cup tells a story of the Real Pizza family.








#1



### Monster Cup


The inaugural title that started it all. A gritty, unforgettable campaign that put Real Pizza on the map and ignited the fire within our squad.







#2



### European League


Conquering the continent with our signature high-press style. A testament to tactical brilliance and unwavering team spirit under the brightest lights.







#3



### Europe Friendlies


Dominating the pre-season elite circuit. These victories sharpened our edge and proved we could hang with the very best.







#4



### Toto Cup


A hard-fought domestic triumph. The Toto Cup showcased the depth of our roster and the heart of our youth academy prospects.







#5



### Passover Tournament


Winning during the holiday season made this one extra special. A gift to our loyal fans who packed the stands and roared us to victory.







#6



### 2019 Camp


Where future legends were forged. The 2019 summer camp produced three first-team regulars and cemented our commitment to grassroots excellence.







#7



### State Cup


A historic domestic double year. The State Cup run was defined by dramatic late winners and a rock-solid defensive wall.







#8



### Summer Camp 2020


Adapting and overcoming. Despite global challenges, the 2020 camp was a resounding success, fostering resilience and technical growth.







#9



### Passover Camp 2021/22


Back-to-back holiday camps that unearthed incredible talent. A celebration of community, culture, and competitive fire.







#10



### Men's League 2023/24


The ultimate prize. Winning the men's league championship validated our project and established a dynasty for years to come.







#11



### Champion of Champions


Beating the best to be the best. This elite super cup showdown was a masterclass in high-stakes football.







#12



### Euro for Clubs 2024


Representing the nation with pride. Our Euro 2024 campaign captured hearts with its attacking flair and never-say-die attitude.







#13



### Champions League x3


The pinnacle of club football. Lifting the Champions League trophy three times places Real Pizza among the immortals of the game.







#14



### Club Tournament


The complete collection. This victory completed our trophy cabinet and solidified our reputation as a true powerhouse in recreational sports.

















## Our Trophy Cabinet


A visual celebration of silverware, title nights, team celebrations, and club symbols tied to the most meaningful victories in Real Pizza history.









3x

### Champions League









1x

### Euro 2024









1x

### Monster Cup









22x

### European League









1x

### State Cup









1x

### Champions of Champions









1x

### Toto Cup









14x

### Club Tournament





















## ארון התארים





14 תארים יוקרתיים בארון של ריל פיצה. מורשת של אלופים.







התואר הנכסף




### ליגת האלופות


3 פעמים


ההישג האירופי הגדול ביותר. ריל פיצה זכתה בליגת האלופות שלוש פעמים, והפכה למועדון הישראלי המעוטר ביותר במפעל.


2018
•
2020
•
2022









### יורו לקבוצות 2024


הזכייה הטרייה והמתוקה מכולן. אליפות אירופה לקבוצות שהביאה את הגביע הביתה בקיץ 2024.









### גביע המונסטר


הטורניר שהתחיל את המסורת. גביע המונסטר היה התואר הראשון שהניח את היסודות למועדון מנצח.









### ליגת אירופית


קמפיין אירופי בלתי נשכח שהסתיים בהנפה מרשימה של גביע הליגה האירופית.









### גביע הטוטו


דומיננטיות מקומית. ריל פיצה הניפה את גביע הטוטו לאחר עונה מושלמת.









### גביע המדינה


התואר המקומי היוקרתי ביותר. ניצחון בגמר גביע המדינה לעיני עשרות אלפי אוהדים.









### אלוף האלופים


קרב בין הטובות ביותר. ריל פיצה זכתה בתואר אלוף האלופים והוכיחה עליונות מוחלטת.









### הליגה לגברים 2023/24


אליפות ליגת הגברים בעונה היסטורית. ריל פיצה שלטה בליגה ללא עוררין.









### טורניר למועדונים


תחרות בינלאומית יוקרתית. ריל פיצה ייצגה את ישראל בכבוד וזכתה בטורניר למועדונים.






#### תארים נוספים


- 2022 ליגת אירופית 22

- 2021 ידידות אירופה 3

- 2020 טורניר הפסח 5

- 2019 מחנה 2019 6

- 2020 מחנה הקיץ 2020 8

- 2022 מחנה הפסח 2021/22 9







14 תארים. מורשת אחת.













## Meet the Squad Behind the Trophies


From 14 major titles to the next kickoff, Real Pizza is powered by the people who wear the crest. Discover the full lineup, the management team, and the passion that drives every match. Step inside and get to know the champions up close.

Meet the Players

## Meet the Masters of the Pitch — Real Pizza

URL: https://example.com/squad-management
Description: Get to know Adi, Eyal, Itai, and our full star-studded squad with shirt numbers. See the team driving our community-powered soccer revolution. Step into our world!

Meet the Masters of the Pitch — Real Pizza

- Home
- Club Legacy

צור קשר











# The Squad & Management


Meet the people behind Real Pizza — the leadership, the coaching staff, and the full player roster driving our trophy-winning legacy forward.

















## Our Management


The leadership driving Real Pizza forward. Experience, passion, and a winning mentality at the core of every decision.








Club Manager

### Adi


Steering the club with vision and integrity, building a legacy that lasts.









Coach

### Eyal


Architect of our game. Tactical genius with fire in his heart and trophies in his sights.









Assistant Coach

### Itai


The engine behind the scenes. Sharp analysis, relentless support, and a champion's mindset.


















## הסגל שלנו


הכירו את השחקנים שיביאו את הגביע הביתה




1

### שמאל סלטו


שוער



2

### אביאל


הגנה



3

### נועם קוזיה


הגנה



4

### הראל


הגנה



5

### יהונתן ליבנה


הגנה



6

### אסף דניאל


קישור



7

### איתיוס נחמן


קישור



8

### שחקן 8


קישור



9

### לי


התקפה



10

### נועם


התקפה



11

### שחקן 11


התקפה



12

### שחקן 12


שוער













The Squad Ethos


## Built on Brotherhood,Forged in Fire.


Real Pizza isn't just a team; it's a movement. Every player who wears the yellow and orange carries the weight of a legacy defined by 14 major trophies and an unbreakable competitive spirit. From the floodlit nights of the Champions League to the raw grit of the domestic cup, our identity is rooted in unity, discipline, and the electric energy of our community. This is more than football — this is family.









### Explosive Energy


High-intensity pressing and lightning transitions define our style. We never stop running.









### Tactical Discipline


Every player knows their role. Our structure is our strength, turning defense into attack in seconds.









### Club Spirit


We play for the badge, the fans, and each other. Real Pizza is a lifestyle, not just a club.
























## Club DNA


More than a team — a brotherhood forged in yellow and orange, built on legacy, grit, and the relentless pursuit of silverware.








### 14


Major Titles


From the Monster Cup to three Champions League crowns, our trophy cabinet tells the story of a dynasty.







### 3


Management Pillars


Led by Adi, Eyal, and Itai — a stable leadership trio that drives our vision on and off the pitch.







### 100%


Supporter-First


Every decision, every signing, every kit drop — designed for the fans who make Real Pizza unstoppable.







### Unified


Core Values


Respect, passion, and community — the principles that ignite every match and unite our global family.













מחושלת תחת הזרקורים. בנויה לתפארה. ריל פיצה היא יותר ממועדון — זו מורשת בתנועה.

## Wear the Heat, Own the Pride — Real Pizza

Official Merchandise

# Wear the Legacy


### Premium kits, fan gear, and souvenirs designed to deepen your supporter identity. Step into the Real Pizza universe.

Contact the Club













## Fan Shops


Gear up with official Real Pizza merchandise. From match-day kits to exclusive souvenirs, represent the Pizza everywhere.











Official



### Match Kits & Training Wear


Step onto the pitch in authentic Real Pizza gear. Our official match kits, training jerseys, and performance wear are designed for champions. Feel the energy of the Monster Cup and Champions League victories every time you suit up.


From 249 ILS
Shop Kits  →











### Fan Apparel & Accessories


Wear your pride off the pitch. Premium streetwear, caps, scarves, and bags that blend supporter culture with modern fashion.


From 89 ILS
Shop Fan Gear  →











### Souvenirs & Collectibles


Take home a piece of history. Exclusive memorabilia, trophy replicas, and limited-edition collectibles celebrating our 14 major titles.


From 39 ILS
Shop Souvenirs  →
















## Fan Gear & Merch


Premium kits, scarves, and collectibles — wear the Real Pizza fire.









### Home Kit 2025


Official match jersey with breathable mesh and embroidered crest.

₪249.90









### Away Kit 2025


Stealth charcoal with molten orange trim — dominate any ground.

₪249.90









### Supporter Scarf


Double-knit jacquard scarf with club anthem woven inside.

₪79.90









### Snapback Cap


Structured six-panel cap with 3D raised logo embroidery.

₪119.90









### Supporter Tee


Heavyweight cotton tee with oversized club mark on chest.

₪139.90









### Keychain Set


Set of 3 hard-enamel keyrings — crest, star, and trophy.

₪49.90















## More Than Just Merch


When you wear Real Pizza, you carry the floodlit energy of match night and the weight of 14 major trophies. Official merchandise is how our community stays connected, loud, and unmistakable — whether in the stands or on the street.


- ### Identity & Belonging Wearing the crest isn't just fabric — it's a declaration. You're part of a family that has conquered Europe and lifted the Monster Cup.

- ### Matchday Presence The roar is louder when we dress the part. A unified kit in the stands turns a crowd into a fortress, intimidating every rival that steps onto our pitch.

- ### Gifts That Matter From scarves to signed kits, official Real Pizza gear is the ultimate gift for the fan who lives and breathes every goal. Share the legacy with those you love.


Explore Official Merch



Join the movement. Represent the legacy.











## Ready to Join the Squad?


Whether you're looking for player availability, partnership opportunities, or exclusive supporter merchandise, our team is ready to connect. Reach out to Real Pizza today and become part of our legacy.

Contact the Club

## Fire Up Your Connection — Real Pizza

URL: https://example.com/contact
Description: Ready to join Real Pizza&#39;s community or find recreational sports near you? Reach out to our team for leagues, events, and more. Your pitch awaits—contact us!

צור קשר















# Join the Real Pizza Family


Whether you're a lifelong supporter, a local family looking for a welcoming recreational sports facility, a potential sponsor, or a player ready to be part of something bigger — this is your home. Reach out and let's build the future of Real Pizza together.
















## Get In Touch


Whether you're a lifelong fan, a potential partner, or a young player dreaming of the pitch — we want to hear from you.



- ### Fan & General Inquiries Matchday info, tickets, events, and everything Real Pizza. Reach out and we'll get you sorted.

- ### Team & Youth Matters Interested in joining our youth leagues or connecting with the coaching staff? This is your direct line.

- ### Merchandise & Shop Questions about kits, fan gear, or souvenirs? Our shop team is ready to help you rep the squad in style.

- ### Partnerships & Community We believe in growing together. Reach out for local partnerships, sponsorships, and community collaboration.

[business_phone]





[business_address]








### Send a Message



Full Name



Email Address



Phone Number



Message






I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy



Send Message
















## More Than a Club


Real Pizza is built on the passion of our supporters, the energy of local talent, and a shared hunger for greatness. Every match is a celebration of our community.









### Belonging


From youth leagues to match-day rituals, every fan and player is part of the Real Pizza family.









### Competition


We fuel ambition. Our youth sports leagues and training philosophy forge the champions of tomorrow.









### Pride


Our 14 major titles are a testament to the relentless spirit of our club and the support of our fans.























## JOIN THE MOVEMENT


Real Pizza is more than a team — it's a family, a passion, and a movement. Step into the floodlights and become part of our legacy.



Meet the Squad



Shop Merch

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Club Legacy
- Squad & Management
- Fan Shops



צור קשר








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/18/2026



Real Pizza ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Real Pizza

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice














מחושלת תחת הזרקורים. בנויה לתפארה. ריל פיצה היא יותר ממועדון — זו מורשת בתנועה.

- [business_phone]

#### שעות פעילות


- ב'-ו' 09:00–18:00

- שבת 09:00–13:00

- ראשון סגור

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Club Legacy
- Squad & Management
- Fan Shops



צור קשר








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 18, 2026



Real Pizza is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Real Pizza

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.














מחושלת תחת הזרקורים. בנויה לתפארה. ריל פיצה היא יותר ממועדון — זו מורשת בתנועה.




#### קישורים מהירים


- Home

- Club Legacy

- Squad & Management

- Fan Shops

- Contact





#### צור קשר


- [business_email]

- [business_phone]

- [business_address]

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- Club Legacy
- Squad & Management
- Fan Shops



צור קשר








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 18, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Real Pizza

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Sports & Recreation provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Real Pizza provides Sports & Recreation through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Real Pizza. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Real Pizza

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
